inbound.choose:
<when condition="@{
        var body = context.Request.Body?.As(preserveContent: true);
        if (body == null) return false;
        var maxTokens = body.Value("max_tokens");
        return maxTokens.HasValue && maxTokens.Value > 8000;
      }">
        
          
          
            application/json
          
          @{
            return new JObject(
              new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                new JProperty("code", "TOKEN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED"),
                new JProperty("message", "This account is limited to 8,000 tokens per request. Contact the admin if you need a higher limit."),
                new JProperty("status", 400)
              ))
            ).ToString();
          }
